name: @codeagora/desktop
description: CodeAgora desktop app scaffold — human-facing local UI for sessions, config, and review runs

scripts.dev: pnpm build && echo "Open packages/desktop/dist/index.html for the scaffold preview"
scripts.tauri:check: pnpm build && cd src-tauri && cargo check
scripts.tauri:dev: pnpm build && cd src-tauri && cargo run
